glossary.oldest pastimes: Oldest Pastimes（保留英文，这是品牌名）
glossary.triple your fun: 三重乐趣（NOT 三倍你的乐趣）

rules: Card rank names: ALWAYS use A, K, Q, J, 10, 9... 2 (NEVER 国王, 皇后, 杰克). Example: 'pair of kings' → 一对K, 'queen high' → Q或以上, 'queen high or better' → Q高或更好的牌.

In four-of-a-kind contexts: 'four sixes' → 拿到6的四条, 'four sevens through tens' → 拿到7到10的四条, 'four of a kind six or lower' → 拿到6或以下的四条. Use 拿到 not 有...个. Use numerals (6, 7, 10) not Chinese number words (六个, 七个). Example: NOT '如果你有六个或更低的四条', CORRECT: '如果你拿到6或以下的四条，就保留在一起'.
In Pai Gow: 'set your hand' / 'set hand' = 摆牌 or 分牌 (arranging cards), NOT 设置手牌. 'split' = 拆分.

In Pai Gow: 'play [X] in your high/low hand' ALWAYS means 把[X]放在高/低牌那手. This applies to ANY X including multiple items: 'play straights and flushes in your high hand' = 把顺子和同花放在高牌那手, 'play the pair in your high hand' = 把一对放在高牌那手, 'play three of a kind in your high hand' = 把三条放在高牌那手. NEVER use 打 or 玩 for this pattern — 打顺子 is WRONG, 在高牌那手玩三条 is WRONG.
In Pai Gow: 'Joker' = 鬼牌 (NOT 小丑牌 which means clown). The Joker in Pai Gow acts as a wild card for completing straights, flushes, and as an Ace.

In Pai Gow pair classification: '2 through 6 is a low pair' = 2到6算低对, '7 through 10 is a medium pair' = 7到10算中对, 'J through A is a high pair' = J到A算高对. Use 算 (counts as), NOT 是对 which is grammatically malformed. 'two high pairs' = 两对高对 (NOT 两个高对 or 如果你有两个高对).
Use 游戏 for 'games' in casino contexts (NOT 节目 which means TV programs).
Use 买入 for 'buy-in' (NOT 入场费 which means admission fee).
'table games' = 桌上游戏 (NOT 桌面游戏 which sounds like desktop/tabletop games).
'Trips旁注' — use 旁注 for side bets like Trips, Pair Plus, Bonus. Never translate Trips as 三张同点数赌注 or 三同号.
'Ultimate Texas Hold'em' = 终极德州扑克 (NOT 极限, 至尊, or other variants).
Poker actions must be translated precisely — never confuse check (过牌) with call (跟注).
NEVER translate channel names, brand names, product names, or game titles. Keep them in English unless there is an established official Chinese name. Example: 'Win TV' stays as Win TV, NOT 独赢电视.
'three card poker' = 三张牌扑克 (NOT 三人扑克, which means poker played by three people).

THREE-CARD POKER hand rankings (from low to high): 高牌、一对、同花、顺子、三条、同花顺. Three-card poker has NO 四条 (four of a kind), NO 葫芦 (full house), NO 两对 (two pair). If a caption continuation says 'of a kind' after a previous caption ended with 'three', it means 三条 (three of a kind), NOT 四条.
'slot machine' / 'slots' = 老虎机 (NOT 槽位). 'video slots' = 视频老虎机.
'here is some place to...' or 'some places to...' when meaning 'ways/tips' = 方法/做法 (NOT 位置 which means physical location).
'play the numbers' in gambling context = 按概率来玩 / 按数学概率来玩 (NOT 押注数字 which means bet on numbers).
'big leak' in gambling strategy = 长期来看会很亏 / 长期会失血 (NOT 大漏洞 which is too literal).
'play bet' in UTH/Three Card Poker = Play注. Keep 'Play' in English as it's a specific bet name. Don't translate as 玩注.

In Three Card Poker: 'play or fold' / 'decide to play' = 下Play注或弃牌 (NOT 跟注或弃牌). 'Play' here refers to making the Play bet, not a general action. 跟注 (call) is a different poker action that does NOT exist in Three Card Poker.

'bonus' as a side bet name in poker (e.g., 'bet the bonus', 'the bonus bet') = Bonus旁注 or 押Bonus注. 'ante bonus' = 底注奖金. Keep 'Bonus' in English when it's a bet name. Do NOT translate as 赌bonus or 赌注奖金.
'hole cards' in poker = 底牌 (NOT 整牌). ASR may mishear 'hole' as 'whole' — both should be translated as 底牌.
In slots: 'win' / 'chance to win' = 中奖机会 (NOT 独赢机会 — 独赢 is a horse racing term). 'payouts' = 赔付 (NOT 赔率 which means odds).
In bingo: 'you got bingo' / 'you hit bingo' = Bingo！/ 你中了Bingo！. 'caller' = 报号员. 'dauber' / 'ink dauber' = 宾果点号笔.
In bingo contexts: use 宾果厅 or 场馆 for bingo venue (NOT 赌场 which means casino). Bingo halls are distinct from casinos.
For casino promos: '人人都有机会赢' for 'everyone can win' (NOT 每个人都能独赢).
'a great selection of games' / 'collection of games' = 丰富的游戏选择 (NOT 丰富的游戏收藏 which sounds like collecting games).
'a great atmosphere' / 'great atmosphere to play' = 很棒的游戏氛围 or 舒适愉快的游戏环境 (NOT 一个很好的氛围来玩游戏 which is translation-y).
'Who you got?' in sports betting context is an idiom meaning 'Who are you betting on?' = 你押谁？ or 你看好谁？ (NEVER 你是谁？ which means 'Who are you?').
Natural phrasing: 'this strategy has been simplified so you can learn it' = 这个策略经过简化，方便你学习、记住 (NOT 这种策略简化了让你能够 or 这种策略被简化了以便你可以).
'fewer cards to mark makes it easier to keep up' = 卡片少一点，会更容易跟上游戏节奏 (NOT 减少需要标记的卡片数量会让游戏更容易跟进).
In Pai Gow with Joker/five aces: 'always split them unless you also have a pair of kings' = 务必拆开，除非你还有一对K. Use a SINGLE condition (除非), NOT double-negation or double-unless (否则...否则...).
'over half a dozen' / 'more than half a dozen' = 六七个 or 六个多 (NOT 十几个 which means 'a dozen or so'). 'half a dozen' = 六个, 'a dozen' = 一打/十二个.
'our people' / 'our staff' in casino promo context = 我们的员工 or 我们的工作人员 (NOT 我们的人 which sounds unnatural in Chinese).
In bingo: 'free play' / 'free game' = 免费游戏 (NOT 免费的一次 which is incomplete). 'program' when referring to a bingo event = 活动安排 or 场次 (NOT 程序 which means software/procedure).
In slots: 'reel' = 转轴 (NOT 轮盘 which is roulette). 'symbol' on a slot reel = 符号 or 图案 (NOT 分隔符号 which means delimiter/separator). 'wheel' in bonus wheel = 奖金转盘 (NOT 轮盘切片).

For promo/marketing text: use natural Chinese phrasing, not word-for-word translation. Example: 'plan your next lucky trip' = 开启你的下一次幸运之旅 (NOT 计划你的下一次幸运之旅). 'the best place to play' = 最佳游戏去处 (NOT 最好的地方来玩).
'fold your hand' / 'give up your hand' = 弃牌 (NOT 放弃你的手牌 which is too literal). In poker, 'hand' refers to the cards you hold — never translate as 手牌 in isolation.
'flush draw' = 同花听牌, 'straight draw' = 顺子听牌. Use 听牌 (drawing/waiting for a card), NOT 一张同花听牌 (which adds a wrong counter 一张). Say 有同花听牌 or 拿到同花听牌.
'community cards' / 'board cards' in Hold'em = 公共牌. 'first three community cards' = 前三张公共牌 (the flop). 'flop' = 翻牌 or 前三张公共牌.
'unless you also have two pair' in Pai Gow = 除非你还有两对. Never combine into garbled forms like 一对两对 or 除非你有一对两对.
In bingo: 'run a game' / 'running a game' = 开一局游戏 or 进行一场游戏 (NOT 运行游戏 which sounds like running software).
'for more play' / 'more action' in promo context = 更多精彩玩法 or 更多游戏乐趣 (NOT 为了更多玩法 which is stilted).

Pair counting with classifiers: 'two medium pairs' = 两对中对 (NOT 一对中对). 'two high pairs' = 两对高对. 'two low pairs' = 两对低对. The number before 对 counts HOW MANY pairs. 一对 = one pair, 两对 = two pairs. NEVER say 一对中对 when the English says 'two medium pairs'.
In Pai Gow: 'rules for setting your hand' / 'hand-setting rules' = 摆牌规则 (NOT 设置手牌的规则). 'A high in the low hand' = A放在低牌那手 (NOT A高放在低牌那手).

In UTH: when segment split breaks 'after the dealer turns over / the first three community cards', the translation MUST preserve the timing: 在庄家翻开前三张公共牌后. Do NOT split the condition from its trigger — merge into one clause if needed: '在庄家翻开前三张公共牌后，你可以下相当于底注两倍的Play注'.
In poker: 'waiting for the fourth or better flush' / 'four to a flush' = 有四张同花(差一张成同花) or 同花差一张. Do NOT translate literally as 等待第四好的同花 which is nonsensical.
'help a good cause' / 'support a good cause' = 支持公益事业 (NOT 帮助一个好事业 which is literal and unnatural).
'rely on Win TV as your comprehensive guide' = 把Win TV作为你的全方位指南 (NOT 依赖Win TV作为你全面的指南 — 依赖 sounds like dependency/addiction).
'plan your next lucky trip' / 'ready to plan' = 开启你的下一次幸运之旅 or 准备开启你的幸运之旅 (NOT 准备好计划你的下一次幸运之旅 — 计划 is too literal for marketing copy).
'thanks for watching' / 'thank you for watching' = 感谢收看 (NOT 谢谢观看 which is understandable but less broadcast-standard).

In slots: 'full reel symbol' / 'full reel' = 整轴符号 (NOT 完整的转轴符号). 'split symbol' = 分裂符号 (NOT 分割符号 which means divider). 'double symbol' = 双倍符号 (NOT 双赢符号 which means double-win). 'wheel slice' / 'slice of the wheel' = 转盘格 (NOT 转盘切片 which sounds like food slicing).
In slots bonus mechanics: 'awards extra credits through this payout' = 通过这个赔付额外奖励积分 (NOT 通过这种赔付...给予额外积分 which is stilted). Use 奖励 not 给予 for prize-giving.

Avoid translationese in strategy/promo text: 'tips on strategy' = 策略小贴士 or 实用策略 (NOT 玩法策略的建议). 'it becomes very easy to play correctly' = 正确玩法就变得很简单 (NOT 正确地玩游戏就变得非常容易). 'win more money' = 赢更多 or 提高赢面 (NOT 赢得更多钱 which is too literal). 'lots of great games' = 丰富多样的游戏 (NOT 有很多精彩玩法).

In horse racing: 'place' = finishing 1st or 2nd (前二/位置注), 'show' = finishing 1st, 2nd, or 3rd (前三/展示注). 'Win/Place/Show' = 独赢/位置/展示. Do NOT translate 'place' as '第二名' or 'show' as '第三名' — they mean 'top 2' and 'top 3' respectively.
'pari-mutuel' in horse racing = 彩池投注 (NOT 联合投注 which sounds like joint betting). Pari-mutuel means all bets are pooled.
In slots: 'overhead screen' / 'top screen' = 顶部屏幕 (NOT 头顶屏幕 which sounds like it's on your head). 'Triple your fun' = 三倍乐趣 or 乐趣翻三倍 (NOT 三倍你的乐趣 which is literal English word order).
'pelican' = 鹈鹕 (NOT 海鸥 which is seagull). These are different birds.
'buy-ins for any budget' / 'buy-in amounts' = 买入金额适合各种预算 (NOT 投入资金适合各种预算 — 投入资金 sounds like investment capital).
'Who you got?' / 'Who do you got?' in sports betting = 你看好谁？ or 你押谁？ followed by 我们这边 (NOT 我们的人 which sounds unnatural). Example: 'Who you got? Our people.' → '你看好谁？我们这边。'
In bingo: 'program' as a printed guide = 场次说明单 or 玩法说明单 (NOT 节目单 which means TV show listing, and NOT 活动安排 which is too generic).

asr_errors.emotional credit: additional credit / extended credit (in slot machine contexts)
asr_errors.Who you got: Who do you have? (你押谁？ — sports betting idiom for 'who are you betting on?')
